summary.standalone_not_acceptance_reason: Unreal shaders require generated FShaderCompilerEnvironment virtual includes, permutation defines, generated uniform buffers, and platform metadata; raw standalone DXC is only a control lane.
summary.claim: All 497 raw SM6-sensitive inventory files are assigned to an authoritative lane. Only valid generated DXIL artifacts are treated as M12 inputs; raw missing-environment failures are not M12 failures.

phase15_16_summary.source: Unreal-native METAL_SM6 material debug dump generated environment artifacts
phase15_16_summary.claim: source-backed Unreal-generated SM6 DXIL artifacts are replayed offline through MSC4/native Metal PSO creation; compute subset is also PSO-created through M12. This is fallback evidence, not universal PCD3D_SM6 completion.

records.reason: no standalone entrypoint; compile through owning top-level Unreal shader job
